differential_diagnoses: Supraventricular tachycardia (atrial flutter with variable block)
Prosthetic mitral valve thrombosis or dysfunction
next_steps: Immediate emergency department transfer and continuous hemodynamic monitoring
12-lead electrocardiogram to define the tachycardia mechanism
Urgent ICD interrogation to evaluate stored electrograms and pacing history
Point-of-care ultrasound (POCUS) to assess cardiac filling and biventricular function
Stat serum electrolytes (potassium, magnesium), troponin, and NT-proBNP
Intravenous fluid resuscitation if hypovolemic, followed by re-evaluation of blood pressure
Preparation for synchronized electrical cardioversion if clinical instability worsens
